title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Yamato, King, Momonosuke, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Right now YAMATO and MOMONOSUKE ARE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy forces make up a total of about 5400 men.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The majority of them are Samuel, with Oden's retainers making up their core.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Kill momonosuke and bring me his head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They desire to make Oden's son, "Kozuki MOMONOGUKE" the Shogun of Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Pirates... they're a different story!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you still acting out? Young master Yamato!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not acting out!! In the name of the Kouzuki family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm partial- pating in this war!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't let him take another breath!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: until his head is off his body...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
